summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hussain Maat Foundation fund management app with new fee structure. All core functionalities working correctly including Super Admin login, fee configuration (PKR 200/month, PKR 2400/year), fee collection with monthly/yearly options, extra donation support, and dashboard calculations.

integration_issues.issue: Authentication tokens expire quickly causing redirects to login page during extended testing

passed_tests: Super Admin login with +923142256184 and PIN 1234
Backend API health check and authentication
Active fee configuration display and validation
Monthly fee submission with month selection
Yearly fee submission with all 12 months
Dashboard calculations based on active fee config
Monthly Fees page UI with active configuration card
Fee Collection page with complete form elements
Month grid display for monthly payments
Form validation and submit button states
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (13/13 tests), Frontend: 95% (minor session management issue)
